# PulseMCP Listing Draft

Title: RunAPI MCP Server

URL: https://github.com/runapi-ai/mcp

Summary: A TypeScript MCP server for RunAPI model discovery, pricing lookup, media generation tasks, polling, balance checks, and LLM chat.

Authentication: Optional for catalog tools; `RUNAPI_API_KEY` required for task creation, balance checks, and chat.

Package: `@runapi.ai/mcp`
